description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk constructed from a light gray stone material, featuring a square base that steps up in two tiers before rising into a tapering shaft. The front face of the shaft is adorned with engraved symbols or runes, highlighted with a faint blue tint, giving it an ancient or mystical appearance. The remaining sides of the shaft are plain, with visible stone texture and subtle blue edge highlights. The stone surface is slightly marbled, with natural-looking cracks and veins running throughout, suggesting weathering and age. The obelisk stands on a broad, square plinth that provides stability and visual prominence. The tip of the obelisk is sharply pointed, maintaining the geometric, monolithic style typical of commemorative or decorative urban monuments.
description: A tall, gray stone obelisk with engraved blue-tinted runes on the front, standing on a stepped square base. The shaft is plain on three sides and pointed at the top, with a weathered, marbled texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing engraved blue-tinted runes on the shaft and the stepped square base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain stone shaft with visible marbling and no engravings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain shaft and the same stepped base, no engravings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a plain shaft and the marbled stone texture.
attribute_inscription: Engraved runes or symbols are present on the front face of the shaft, highlighted in blue, with no recognizable language; the style is angular and decorative, and the engravings are moderately legible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative engravings in the form of runes or symbols are present only on the front face of the shaft; no other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, square plinth with two stepped tiers, constructed from the same marbled gray stone as the shaft, with no additional decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, forming a clean pyramid shape with no additional decoration or embellishment.
